import.title: Import petdex pet
import.desc: Pick a spritesheet.webp (required) and pet.json (optional) downloaded from petdex; it becomes available in the gallery.
import.gridError: Spritesheet {{w}}×{{h}} isn't a multiple of a {{cols}}×{{rows}} grid, so frames won't slice correctly. Use a standard 8×9 sheet, or declare the right cols/rows in pet.json.
import.hint: Pets are stored only in your browser (IndexedDB), never uploaded; the spritesheet must be petdex's standard 8×9 grid.

gallery.title: Choose a companion

aiAssistant.title: Xia Director
aiAssistant.description: Open Xia Director beside the current creation page.
aiAssistant.emptyDescription: Ask about project progress, failed tasks, or have the assistant organize your creative plan.
aiAssistant.syncingHistoryDescription: Connecting to Xia Director and syncing chat history. Please wait.
aiAssistant.disclaimer: Xia Director can make mistakes. Check key story, character, and asset details.
aiAssistant.placeholder: After uploading a script, ask Xia Director to advance episodes, visuals, audio, or final video
waitingResponses: Xia Director is checking the storyboard

Xia Director is shaping the shot

project.name: Project Name
project.nameNoChinese: Project name cannot contain Chinese characters.
project.nameInvalid: Project name can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.

project.trashRetentionHint: Items in Trash are kept until you delete them permanently.
project.emptyArchivedDescription: Archived projects will appear here. You can unarchive them anytime.
project.emptyTrashDescription: Deleted projects will appear here. You can restore or permanently delete them.
project.noActiveDescription: Create a new project, or check the Archived and Trash tabs for your other projects.

archiveDialog.description: The project will be moved to Archived. You can unarchive it anytime.

deleteDialog.title: Move "{{name}}" to Trash?
deleteDialog.description: The project will be moved to Trash. You can restore it anytime before deleting it permanently.

purgeDialog.title: Permanently delete "{{name}}"?
purgeDialog.description: All scripts, sketches, audio, and video for this project will be removed. This cannot be undone.

pikoMiniGame.title: Piko a bit, find your spark

insight.combo: Your rhythm is back. Storyboards should move easier now.
insight.jelly: You slowed the rhythm down. Good time to push steadily.
insight.burst: Burst timing is sharp. Start with the high points.
insight.rain: You caught the idea rain. Batch work should flow.
insight.flow: The engine is warm again. Push one small section.
insight.soft: Break complete. No need to brute-force the brain.

renderGrid.title: Render Grid

batch.narrationIncompatible: This model only supports dialogue shots ({{count}} narration beats incompatible)
batch.rewriteScriptDesc: Regenerate all beat narrations from source/adapted text. Existing text and sketch stale marks will be affected.
batch.genSketchDesc: Generate sketches for all beats. Existing sketches won't be overwritten; new ones enter the candidate pool.
batch.autoSelectDesc: Automatically pick the best sketch from the candidate pool for every beat.
batch.insertManualBeforeFirstTooltip: Insert a manual shot before the first beat
batch.genMissingManualDesc: Batch generate sketches for newly inserted manual shots in this episode that are missing one, grouped by scene.
batch.genMissingManualTooltip: Generate sketches for newly inserted manual shots in this episode that are missing one, grouped by scene
batch.genMissingManualEmpty: No manual shots are missing a sketch
batch.genRenderDesc: Generate full-episode Render grids through the standard Render Plan flow. Sketches and AI identity detections are required first.
batch.genRenderTooltip: Open full-episode Render Plan (standard generate_grid mode)
batch.aiDetectTooltip: Use AI vision to detect which colored characters appear in each sketch
batch.aiDetectSuccess: AI detect complete: {{beats}} beats, {{ids}} identities, {{props}} props
batch.aiDetectReview: Review each beat; add missing identities or props under More if AI missed anything.
batch.reassignColorsDesc: This will reassign colors for this episode's sketches based on current script identities. Existing sketches may display inconsistent color markers.
batch.reassignColorsTooltip: Reassign colors based on script identities (idempotent)
batch.reassignColorsSuccess: Reassigned colors for {{count}} identities and {{propCount}} props
batch.genAudioDesc: Generate TTS voiceover for all beats missing audio.
batch.genAudioUnavailableForVideoModel: The current video model does not need separate full-episode audio generation
batch.genVideoDesc: Generate video clips for all beats missing video. Requires sketches/renders and audio first.
batch.aiOptimizeDesc: Use SuperPower to analyze this episode's sketches and generate video prompts for all beats.
batch.regenSketchSingleDesc: Split #{{beats}} into 1×1 sketch tasks using the current aspect ratio.
batch.regenSketchDesc: Regenerate sketches for #{{beats}}. New sketches enter candidate pool.
batch.regenRenderDesc: Re-render #{{beats}}. New renders enter candidate pool.
batch.genBatchAudioDesc: Dispatch one IndexTTS2 audio task for #{{beats}}.
batch.genBatchVideoDesc: Generate video clips for #{{beats}} one by one. Requires sketches/renders and audio.
batch.batchHint: Recommended mode highlighted. Audio dispatches one async task for selected beats; video still runs beat by beat.
batch.sketchGroupRunning: Matching sketch group is already running
batch.sketchSameSceneRequired: Sketch regen can only use beats from the same scene; current scenes: {{scenes}}
batch.sketchSceneMissingRequired: Selected beats are missing scene bindings, so same-scene regen cannot be verified: #{{beats}}. Plan or bind scenes first.
batch.sketchDispatchDuplicate: These beats are already in the sketch regen dispatch card above: #{{beats}}. Use Generate group there or remove the card first.
batch.sketchDispatchOverlap: These beats are already used by the sketch regen dispatch card above: #{{beats}}. Use Generate group there or remove the card first.
batch.audioDispatched: Dispatched IndexTTS2 audio task for {{count}} beats

verify.notGenerated: This report has not been generated yet. Verification runs automatically at the relevant pipeline gate, or after batch operations in the Shots tab.

compose.readyToCompose: All beats ready — click "Compose Episode" in the top right to start
compose.noClips: No video clips available to compose
compose.noClipsHint: Generate videos for this episode's beats first, then return here to compose the final cut.
compose.blockerSubtitle: The following beats are still missing assets. Complete them before composing.

lockdown.banner: Region changed in another tab, reloading…

backToNodes.hint: No nodes in the current view. Click the button to jump back to your content.

canvas.emptyHintDescription: Double-click for nodes, hold left-click to box-select
canvas.emptyHintAfterTab: or double-click to create a node

crossProjectAssets.success: Copied {{count}} media asset(s) into this project
crossProjectAssets.partialFailure: {{count}} media asset(s) failed to copy; original links kept

toolDialog.noProcessableImage: No processable image for current node
toolDialog.splitDiscardHint: (red areas are separator pixels discarded during extraction)

nodeToolbar.multiDimensionPrompt: Generate multi-angle views of the same subject (front, 3/4 side, profile, back) while keeping style, lighting, and materials consistent.
nodeToolbar.relightPrompt: Keep the composition and subject unchanged; redesign the lighting only — adjust direction, color temperature, and contrast for a more cinematic look.
nodeToolbar.hdPrompt: Upscale this image to high definition: sharpen details and textures, remove noise and compression artifacts, while preserving the original composition, palette, and subject features.
nodeToolbar.outpaintPrompt: Naturally extend the canvas outward (outpainting): fill in plausible surroundings, lighting, and background while keeping the original subject, style, and atmosphere consistent.
nodeToolbar.repaintPrompt: Keep the subject and composition; repaint the image overall to improve quality and consistency, while preserving subject features, palette, and style.
nodeToolbar.erasePrompt: Erase distracting or unwanted elements from the image (clutter, text, watermarks) and seamlessly inpaint the occluded regions, keeping subject and background style consistent.
nodeToolbar.mattingPrompt: Cut out the subject and replace the background with a clean transparent (or solid) backdrop, preserving fine edge details (hair strands, semi-transparent regions) realistically.
nodeToolbar.noDownloadPresetPathsHint: No quick-save folder. Use default download.

gridMenu.multiCameraGridPrompt: From this image, generate a 3x3 grid of multi-camera views covering front, left/right 3/4, profiles, back, and varied tilt angles, keeping the subject, style, lighting, and materials fully consistent.
gridMenu.plotFourGridPrompt: From this image, project the next plot beats and generate a 2x2 grid of consecutive frames within the same scene, preserving character design, spatial relationships, lighting, and overall style.
gridMenu.faceThreeViewPrompt: From this character face, generate front, 3/4, and full profile three-view sheets, keeping hairstyle, facial proportions, skin tone, gaze, and expression style consistent on a clean neutral background.
gridMenu.productThreeViewPrompt: From this product, generate front, side, and top three-view sheets, keeping materials, colors, proportions, and details accurate on a clean neutral background suitable for product display.
gridMenu.serialStoryboard25Prompt: From this image, generate a coherent 25-cell storyboard covering a full narrative beat (setup-development-climax-resolution), keeping character design, scene setting, shot style, and atmosphere consistent.
gridMenu.cinematicLightCorrectionPrompt: Apply cinematic light grading: refine key/fill light relationship, adjust color temperature, contrast, and highlight/shadow layering for added volume and cinematic feel, while keeping subject and composition unchanged.
gridMenu.characterThreeViewPrompt: From this character, generate front, side, and back full-body three-view sheets, keeping costume, accessories, body proportions, and overall style consistent on a unified neutral background suitable for character sheets.
gridMenu.frameProjection3sLaterPrompt: Project the state 3 seconds after this frame: continue character motion, expression, camera position, and environmental lighting naturally, while keeping character design and visual style consistent.
gridMenu.frameProjection5sEarlierPrompt: Reconstruct the state 5 seconds before this frame: infer the initiating actions, expressions, spatial relationships, and camera position, while keeping character design and visual style consistent.

video.subtitleRemovalTip: AI-powered subtitle removal — Chinese & English only

audio.m4aSourceOnly: Source isn't m4a, so it can't be converted to m4a

multiAngleEditor.title: Multi-Dimension Editor
multiAngleEditor.promptPlaceholder: Optional: add mood, style, or framing details…
multiAngleEditor.promptIntro: From the reference image, render the same subject under these camera conditions:
multiAngleEditor.promptExtraDefault: - Extra: preserve additional detail, mood and stylistic nuance.
multiAngleEditor.promptOutro: Keep the subject's costume, accessories, overall style, and lighting consistent with the original; only the camera angle and framing should change.

lightEditor.title: Lighting Editor
lightEditor.smartPlaceholder: Describe the lighting you want, e.g. soft morning light from front-left, warm cinematic mood.

presetPrompts.overexposedFilm: High-contrast overexposed film look — bright highlights, gentle grain, nostalgic warm cast.
presetPrompts.blueBacklight: Strong blue backlight from behind the subject, glowing rim around silhouette, overall cool palette.
presetPrompts.rembrandt: Classic Rembrandt lighting: single 45°/45° key, telltale triangle highlight on the shadow-side cheek, background falls off.
presetPrompts.cyberpunk: Cyberpunk neon — magenta and cyan neon sources, wet reflections, moody glow.
presetPrompts.psychedelicSunset: Psychedelic sunset gradient — purple-red to orange sky temperature, soft lens flare.
presetPrompts.mysteriousDark: Low-key mysterious lighting — vast shadows with a single side light grazing the subject, smoky atmosphere.
presetPrompts.goldenHour: Golden-hour warm light — low-angle golden sun raking across one side, soft rim glow.
presetPrompts.nolanCool: Nolan-style cool grey — desaturated blue-grey light, hard contrast, cinematic realism.

lightEditor.promptIntro: Keep composition, subject and materials unchanged. Re-light the image with these instructions:
lightEditor.promptRimLight: - Rim light: on (soft contour around the subject)
lightEditor.promptOutro: Preserve subject features, wardrobe and background details. Only redesign lighting, shadow and color temperature.

modelParams.providerKeyRequiredDesc: {{provider}} is not configured yet. Please add its API key in Settings before using it.
modelParams.thinkingLevelDesc: Only applies to fal Nano Banana 2. High thinking adds extra cost.

imageNode.title: Image Node
imageNode.dragImage: Drag or click to upload image
imageNode.waitingResultDelayed: Already waited {{minutes}} minutes with no result yet. Still waiting...
imageNode.selectToEdit: Select this node and enter a prompt below to generate or edit image

directorControlBundle.tooltip: Complete Director composite asset with combined image, env-only image, and metadata. The thumbnail shows the combined image.

imageEdit.promptPlaceholder: Describe anything you want to generate or edit

contextPalette.empty: No shot color context is available for this node

placeholders.visual: Unset; click to enter the opening frame

status.standaloneLocalOnly: Custom context; only used on this canvas.
status.stale: Local changes are not synced to mainline; skills use this node.
status.fresh: Context is synced; skills use this node.

upload.hint: Drag here or click upload to add an image or video

textNode.placeholder: Write a story, scene, or character idea. For example: in an old station on a rainy night, a late letter changes everyone's choice.

videoUpscale.title: Video Upscale
videoUpscale.placeholder: Configure the parameters below to generate the HD video

panel.title: Video Upscale
panel.frameInterpolationLockedHint: Base version supports no interpolation only

videoNode.clickToUpload: Click or drag to upload video

audio.title: Generate Audio
audio.durationExceeded: Total audio duration must not exceed {{max}} seconds. Shorten or replace the audio reference and try again.

threeD.title: Director World
threeD.description: Load Director World assets from the same-origin manifest.
threeD.panoSourceStatus: 360 source: frame inside the sphere and place director elements
threeD.panoSourceHint: 360 source · yaw / view angle / capture · actors, props, and staging remain director elements in the world
threeD.sceneDirectorWorldDescription: Load scene Director World assets from the same-origin manifest.
threeD.beatDirectorWorldDescription: Open Director World with the current shot context.
threeD.backgroundCropperTitle: Select a {{aspect}} region as background source{{source}}
threeD.backgroundCropperDescription: Drag the selection with locked {{aspect}}. Confirming submits it through the current background node to the mainline beat.
threeD.backgroundCropperGenerated: Generated the current background and wrote it to mainline
threeD.selectedBackgroundSourceHint: This updates the output node first. Preset mainline nodes auto-commit; user-created nodes need confirmation on the output node.
threeD.directorCombinedSourceHint: You can also connect a custom image to Director combined source, then use Submit to write the same output.
threeD.directorControlBundleMissing: Missing env-only image and metadata for the Director composite asset. Submit again from Director World.
threeD.directorControlCommitted: Committed Director composite asset: {{path}} (includes env-only and metadata).
threeD.canvasSaveConflictBeforeCommit: The canvas was not saved. Resolve the conflict before committing.
threeD.exportControlFrameSuccess: Exported Director composite asset: {{path}} (includes env-only and metadata).
threeD.actionActorSub: Cycle creatable actors / right-click to create
threeD.actionPropSub: Cycle creatable props / right-click to create
threeD.actionStagingSub: Cycle staging / right-click for AI create
threeD.stageClickToEnter: Click scene to enter Director World
threeD.stageShortcutHint: 1/2 cycle creatable actors/props · 3 cycle staging · 4 export combined/env/meta · right-click create · C select crosshair · F move to crosshair · M mount to crosshair · arrow keys/IJKL/UO nudge · R/T rotate · -/+ scale · Esc exit

shortcuts.title: Director World shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Click the scene to enter Director World before using shortcuts.
shortcuts.select: Cycle creatable actors, props, and staging
shortcuts.place: Select crosshair, move to crosshair, ground, mount
shortcuts.transform: Rotate, scale, and cycle actor pose
shortcuts.camera: Move behind, face, or look at the selected object
shortcuts.saveExport: Save director state / export control frame

threeD.directorWorldDescription: Load same-origin SOG or 360 panorama sources.

sourceCalibration.title: World Calibration
sourceCalibration.sogHint: Adjust the current world source position, angle, and scale; actors, props, and staging still stay on the horizontal floor.
sourceCalibration.panoHint: Adjust the 360 sphere position, orientation, and scale; actors, props, and staging still stay on the horizontal floor.

threeD.aiStagingPrompt: Tell BuilderGPT what staging prop to add (for example: horse, sedan chair, stack of boxes):
threeD.noBeatPalette: This Beat has no detected identities / props; Director World will not create arbitrary identities.
threeD.noBeatActorPalette: Assigned actor colors are missing, so actors cannot be created. Assign colors in the mainline Beat first.
threeD.noBeatPropPalette: Assigned prop colors are missing, so props cannot be created. Assign colors in the mainline Beat first.
threeD.submitCurrentViewAsDirectorCombined: Submit current view as Director combined
threeD.outputCurrentViewAsDirectorCombined: Output current view as Director combined
threeD.outputHint: combined keeps actor/prop occlusion; env_only hides actors/props for the current Beat background.
threeD.sourceBadge: {{sourceKind}} PLY · Input asset loaded through same-origin OpenResty static resources
threeD.shortcutHint: Right click / Shift+left click to place · Left click to select · 1/2/3 switch tools · P save director state · F move to crosshair · M mount to crosshair · G ground · R/T rotate · H fit view

beatOverlay.title: Shot overlay
beatOverlay.inheritedFromBeat: Not saved yet; temporarily using shot {{beat}}

freezone_sketch_from_context.name: Sketch from Current Background
freezone_sketch_from_context.description: Generate a mainline sketch candidate from shot context and current background.

freezone_sketch_from_director_combined.name: Sketch from Director Combined
freezone_sketch_from_director_combined.description: Generate a mainline sketch candidate from shot context and Director combined image.

freezone_frame_from_context.name: Frame from Shot Context
freezone_frame_from_context.description: Render a mainline frame candidate from shot context, sketch, and references.

freezone_set_selected_background.name: Set Current Background
freezone_set_selected_background.description: Set the current shot background from an explicit image source without calling an image model.

freezone_set_director_combined.name: Set Director Combined
freezone_set_director_combined.description: Set the current shot Director composite asset from an explicit image source without calling an image model.

freezone_scene_360.name: Generate 360 Panorama
freezone_scene_360.description: Generate a 2:1 scene panorama candidate from a scene master.

statusMessages.noActorPreset: Assigned actor colors are missing; assign colors in the mainline Beat first
statusMessages.noPropPreset: Assigned prop colors are missing; assign colors in the mainline Beat first
statusMessages.deleteNeedsShift: Press Shift+Delete to delete the selected object

settings.title: Settings

modelConfig.title: Model Config
modelConfig.description: Choose a model gateway channel: the platform official gateway, or your own local NewAPI.
modelConfig.baseUrlHint: The server can also pin this value via the NEWAPI_BASE_URL environment variable.
modelConfig.gatewayNotConfiguredImpact: The active model gateway is not configured. Text, image, video, and audio model calls will fail; configure the official channel or custom NewAPI before generating content.

official.description: Enter the platform official gateway URL and API Key, then save. You may enter the root domain or the full /v1 URL.
official.saved: Saved and switched to the official channel.
official.missingFields: Please fill in the gateway URL and API Key.

custom.description: Enter your local NewAPI URL and database settings, then initialize. The backend connects the DB, creates a token, writes the config, and switches to the custom channel.
custom.initialized: Initialized and switched to the custom channel.
custom.databaseDescription: Used to find the admin user and fill access_token; for SQLite use sqlDsn=local plus an existing one-api.db absolute path.
custom.setupAdminDescription: Leave this empty if your NewAPI instance is already initialized. If it is fresh, enter an admin password and the backend will call your NewAPI /api/setup endpoint to create the admin user.
custom.setupPasswordOnlyOnce: This username and password are sent to your NewAPI instance only when creating the first admin on a fresh NewAPI install. If NewAPI is already initialized, entering a password here will not change the existing admin password. DramaClaw does not save the password or use it for later operations; keep it for logging into the NewAPI admin console after first-time setup.
custom.setupRequired: This NewAPI instance has not been initialized yet. Enter the admin username, setup password, and confirmation here, then initialize again.
custom.setupAlreadyInitializedPasswordIgnored: Your NewAPI instance is already initialized. This run did not call the NewAPI setup endpoint and did not change the existing admin password; the password you entered was ignored and cleared.
custom.setupPasswordIncomplete: Enter both the setup password and confirmation.
custom.setupPasswordTooShort: The setup password must be at least 8 characters.
custom.setupPasswordMismatch: The setup passwords do not match.

featureModels.title: Text Model Mapping
featureModels.description: Assign upstream models to text / LLM features; falls back to the backend default when unset.
featureModels.channelsDescription: Add only the providers you need, then configure the upstream key and optional Base URL override. Each provider can be added once.
featureModels.channelsSaved: Provider channel settings were saved locally.
featureModels.channelsSaveHint: This only saves CE local channel presets and does not immediately modify existing NewAPI channels. The next model-mapping save will update NewAPI channels with these presets. To replace a NewAPI channel key now, use the update button on that channel.
featureModels.syncChannelHint: Immediately updates the existing NewAPI channel key and Base URL for this provider without changing model mappings.
featureModels.noChannelsHint: No provider channel has been added yet. Add a channel first, then select it for feature models.
featureModels.bulkMissingModel: Enter the upstream model to apply first.
featureModels.bulkApplied: Filled {{count}} model draft(s). Click Save Mapping to write them to NewAPI.
featureModels.saveHint: Writes NewAPI channels grouped by provider.
featureModels.noMappings: Fill in an upstream model name for at least one feature first.
featureModels.missingBaseUrl: Fill in the New API URL first.
featureModels.visionRequiredHint: This feature sends images to the upstream model. Choose a multimodal model that supports image input / vision understanding; text-only models may fail at runtime.

features.IDENTITY_PLANNER_ANALYSIS: AI plan identities / default & other analysis
features.IDENTITY_PLANNER_APPEARANCE: AI plan identities / new costume description
features.SCENE_BUILD: Build from graph / scene parse & environment_prompt
features.STYLE_ANALYZER: Create custom style from reference image
features.CONTENT_REWRITER: Rewrite text into short-video voiceover lines

embeddingModel.title: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.description: Embedding model used by novel import / Cognee vector search. The internal model name is fixed as DC-cognee-embedding; choose a channel, enter the upstream model, vector dimension, and optional batch size.
embeddingModel.upstreamModelPlaceholder: Enter upstream embedding model, e.g. text-embedding-3-large
embeddingModel.dimensionWarning: The dimension must match the upstream embedding output. Empty batch size uses the EMBEDDING_BATCH_SIZE env var or the official default 10; models that support larger batches can be tuned upward.
embeddingModel.saveHint: Saving writes the NewAPI mapping and stores the dimension and optional batch size in the CE local config.
embeddingModel.noChannelsHint: Add provider channels above before configuring the embedding model.
embeddingModel.missingProvider: Choose the provider channel for embedding.
embeddingModel.missingModel: Enter the upstream embedding model name.
embeddingModel.invalidBatchSize: Enter a valid embedding batch size.

mediaModels.title: Image / Video / Audio Models
mediaModels.description: These models are already adapted by the backend. Fixed model names cannot be changed; choose a channel and optionally fill the upstream model used as the NewAPI model_mapping value. Empty values default to the fixed model name. Models ending in -value are official-channel only.
mediaModels.saveHint: Saving writes to NewAPI and stores the mapping locally.
mediaModels.saved: Image / video / audio model mappings saved.
mediaModels.noMappings: Choose a channel for at least one image / video / audio model first.
mediaModels.noChannelsHint: Add provider channels above before choosing channels for image / video / audio models.

mediaStorage.title: Image Host / Media Storage
mediaStorage.description: Configure the temporary reference media relay used by NewAPI/upstream models, with Aliyun OSS or Cloudinary.
mediaStorage.providerHint: With this provider we suggest leaving 「Fully-managed asset upload」 off; the free tier has a bandwidth quota, so use it only for point-to-point editing / uploads.
mediaStorage.warningIconLabel: Reference media storage is not configured
mediaStorage.notConfiguredImpact: Reference media storage is not configured. Text-only flows and text-to-image usually still work; features that need to upload local reference images will fail, including XiaHua reference images, character references, identity images, image-to-image, video first frames, and image-to-video. Configure Aliyun OSS or Cloudinary.
mediaStorage.fieldsHint: Saved values are stored in the local CE settings database; full AccessKeys are not returned, so re-enter them when updating.
mediaStorage.cloudinaryFieldsHint: Saved values are stored in the local CE settings database; full API Key / Secret values are not returned, so re-enter them when updating. API Folder is optional; leave it empty to upload to the Cloudinary root.

validation.ttlSeconds: Signed URL TTL must be greater than 0

codexBridge.title: Codex Local Bridge
codexBridge.description: Keep the desktop app running; the browser connection automatically pairs with Codex's access token.

settings.pricingDesc: Manage node price display, exchange rate conversion, and credit-pack estimates.
settings.providerGuideText: Different providers vary in model capability, queue speed, stability, and pricing. Switch providers based on your task, and follow each provider's recommended parameters.
settings.nanoBananaProModelDesc: Switch the Nano Banana Pro endpoint for this provider. If one endpoint fails, try another one. See the <modelListLink>model list</modelListLink> for details.
settings.radiusPresetDesc: Control global corner style for panels, inputs, and nodes.
settings.themeToneDesc: Choose neutral, warm, or cool tint for both light and dark themes.
settings.edgeRoutingModeDesc: Switch edge path style between nodes, including orthogonal routing with automatic node avoidance.
settings.accentColorDesc: Used by buttons, selected borders, and interaction highlights.
settings.downloadPresetPathsDesc: Used by node toolbar download menu for quick-save directories (up to 8).
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistent: Keep grid variants aligned with references
settings.storyboardGenKeepStyleConsistentDesc: When enabled, multi-variant grid prompt appends "图片风格与参考图保持一致".
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImage: Disallow descriptive text in grid variants
settings.storyboardGenDisableTextInImageDesc: When enabled, multi-variant grid prompt appends "禁止添加描述文本".
settings.ignoreAtTagWhenCopyingAndGeneratingDesc: When enabled, copied text and embedded grid metadata remove tags like "@图1"; generation requests only remove "@" and keep "图1".
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitle: Use uploaded filename as node title
settings.useUploadFilenameAsNodeTitleDesc: When enabled, newly uploaded images use the file name as the node title by default (still editable via double-click).
settings.downloadPathPlaceholder: Input folder path, e.g. /Users/name/Pictures/BeatWorkbench or D:\\Images\\BeatWorkbench
settings.getApiKeyLink: click here to get API key
settings.aboutIntro: SuperTale candidate generation, free image experimentation, and asset commit workbench.
settings.autoCheckUpdateOnLaunchDesc: Check for updates once every time the app starts.
settings.enableUpdateDialogDesc: Show a custom dialog when a new version is detected.
settings.enableStoryboardGenGridPreviewShortcutDe: When enabled, holding Ctrl + Alt + Shift and clicking Generate on multi-variant grid creates a grid preview node without sending AI request.
settings.showStoryboardGenAdvancedRatioControlsDe: When enabled, show cell/overall ratio info and the Overall/Cell mode switch. When disabled, multi-variant grid uses cell-ratio mode by default.
settings.storyboardGenAutoInferEmptyFrameDesc: When enabled, empty grid cells automatically append "依据之前的内容进行推测" during generation prompt construction.
settings.showNodePrice: Show node price in the header
settings.showNodePriceDesc: Continuously estimate the current run cost from the selected model, resolution, and extra options.
settings.priceDisplayCurrencyModeDesc: In auto mode, Chinese uses CNY and English uses USD.
settings.usdToCnyRateDesc: Used only for price display conversion between USD and CNY. It does not change actual provider billing.
settings.preferDiscountedPriceDesc: Currently this only applies to KIE. The discounted domestic pricing usually needs to be requested from KIE separately; when enabled, estimates prefer that discounted rate.
settings.grsaiCreditTierDesc: GRSAI bills in credits, so the per-run estimate changes with your top-up pack.
settings.checkUpdateUpToDate: You are on the latest version.
settings.checkUpdateFailed: Update check failed. Please try again later.

update.dialogDescription: A new version is available. Do you want to download it now?
update.ignoreTodayVersion: Do not remind this version today

errorDialog.openRouterConfigMessage: This model requires OpenRouter, but the backend API key is not configured. Please contact an administrator.

videoCompose.title: Video Compose

cover.title: Cover
cover.uploadHint: Click or drag to upload an image
cover.captureFailed: Failed to capture the current frame

videoCompose.emptyPreview: Timeline is empty — connect and add video clips

error.noUrl: Compose finished but returned no video URL
error.overlap: Video clips overlap in time, which compositing doesn't support yet. Space the overlapping video clips apart or remove one, then export again.

node.hint: Connect at least {{min}} video nodes to open
